query: SELECT CONCAT('id=', id, ' phone=', phone, ' role=', IFNULL(role,'NULL'), ' status=', IFNULL(status,'NULL'), ' name=', IFNULL(name,'NULL')) as info FROM users WHERE phone LIKE '%184503%';
